scripts.build:viewer: bun build viewer-client.entry.js --target browser --format esm --minify --outfile dist/viewer-client.js
scripts.start: bun run build:viewer && bun run src/index.ts
scripts.watch: bun run build:viewer && bun run src/index.ts --prompt "Use launchBrowser to start a browser, then use computer actions to navigate to the Dropbox customer story page on coder.com, keep the page visible, and briefly confirm once loaded." --max-steps 100
scripts.smoke: bun run src/index.ts --no-viewer --prompt "Use the computer tool to take one screenshot and respond with exactly: READY" --max-steps 6 --screenshot-path ./tmp/smoke-final.png
